title: YEEHAW!
description: Adds a chance for the iconic Rope Zombie sound effect from Plants vs. Zombies to randomly play during gameplay.
body:
[![hosting ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4ccf68084d5bcd931ec540bbe8cbcc4e51c16.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/axolotl-man)



YEEHAW! is a simple and fun mod that randomly plays the "YEEHAW!" sound effect from the Rope Zombie in Plants vs. Zombies during regular Minecraft gameplay. This can happen at unexpected moments, adding a touch of chaos and humor to your world.

Features:
- Randomly triggers the Rope Zombie "YEEHAW!" sound effect while playing Minecraft.
- Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.
- Lightweight and easy to add to any modpack.

Gameplay Impact:
This mod doesn’t change mechanics or add new mobs—it simply adds a surprise element through sound. It’s perfect for friends who enjoy random humor or for content creators who want quirky background events.
